name: [CAPTURED] || Komano Manato ZZZ
description:
˚ ༘ “Do your worst, I’m not telling you shit!”༻♱༉‧₊˚.

SCENARIO:

A “what if” scenario where Komano stays behind while the proxy, Yuzuha and Alice escape the laboratory.

You are tasked with trying to get information out of him, by whatever means necessary…

Will you get him to talk or will you feel bad and let him go?

ੈ✩‧₊˚༺☆༻ੈ✩‧₊˚

Creator Rant:

I’m almost done with the new ZZZ story chapter! But seeing Manato getting interrogated for information gave me some nasty ideas I just had to put into a bot!

This is a little dead dovey, though, so maybe not everyone’s cup of tea! But don’t worry I got more coming for y’all!

Drop down below some of your scenario ideas and they might show up on the next bot!
